name: meshy-prompt-studio
description: Codex plugin for creating Meshy prompts and running Meshy API workflows from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create Meshy prompts and run Meshy API tasks from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Meshy Prompt Studio helps Codex write focused Meshy prompts and directly run Meshy API workflows for Text to 3D, Image to 3D, textures, remeshing, rigging, animations, exports, and troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Use Meshy to create a low-poly game prop and download the GLB.
Write Image to 3D and texture prompts for this prop.
